full_content:
# Summary:
As a Passenger, I want to see the driver's vehicle make and model so that I can easily identify the car at the pickup point.
 --- 
 # DESCRIPTION:
Display the car description (e.g., 'White Toyota Camry') on the 'Driver Arriving' screen.
Ensure the license plate number is shown in a large, readable font.
Update the car icon on the map to match the color of the actual vehicle.
